title: Actions are by intentions
text: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will have what they intended.

title: The pillars of Islam
text: Islam is built upon five: testimony of faith, establishing prayer, giving zakah, hajj, and fasting Ramadan.

title: Best in character
text: The best of you are those who are best to their families.

title: Smiling is charity
text: Your smile for your brother is charity.

title: Allah accepts repentance
text: Allah accepts the repentance of His servant so long as the soul has not reached the throat.

title: Kindness to parents
text: A man asked which deed is best. The Prophet ﷺ mentioned prayer on time, then kindness to parents.

title: Remember the Hereafter
text: Remember often the destroyer of pleasures.

title: Marriage and faith
text: Marriage is part of the way of the Prophet ﷺ and a means of guarding faith and character.
